name: The White House
subject: America Will Be Safer, Stronger, and More Prosperous
body:
Your 1600 Daily
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9fa231e26087ca0d1cf9a8a74c6b690dbe7f865ebc83d37fe51995cc6f41faa5027ae7bee1124f8c63b80142b0985fadf1f3c4d8f084dc57)
# The President's Weekly Address
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9fa231e26087ca0deb5589f9c3ba67b1a87463f850967fa5cc7d38b6d69502d550d8de30b0c034f40e75db76803e37e73397671f2d786da8)
\------------- **Made in America Week**
As the first ever Made in America Week comes to a close, it is clear that under President Donald J. Trump's leadership, America will be safer, stronger, and more prosperous. Yesterday, Corning -- a great American company -- announced plans to investment $4 billion to create 4,000 high-tech manufacturing jobs right here in the United States.
[Watch the Announcement](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9fa231e26087ca0dc8a32e90f7cfed4d268fb90024185d8bf103beeee260b35dcbf0abff5a9c3e19ac961fcf1c120e27fffcfaf5d036c3b1)**President Trump's Six Months of America First**
Just six months in office, President Trump has taken historic actions to honor the promises he made to the America people. On trade, taxes, immigration, and foreign affairs, President Trump and his Administration have put American workers and American families first.
[See the list of accomplishments](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9fa231e26087ca0d8ea7c6f84a7d1d46990560bb05f24fca1c7ca997083a821bb213a163f0a089a335a617054258b153f703983849f2e60a)**USS Gerald R. Ford Commissioning**
Tomorrow, the President will travel to Norfolk, Virginia, and attend the commissioning of the USS Gerald R. Ford, the world's most advanced aircraft carrier and a marvel of American manufacturing and military might.
[Watch Live](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9fa231e26087ca0d574f3f2ef3e716e66b2dce468cf287d0d2198c006337638f3f76455f5a4df0ce56eddf6878f0f279ea8f72278a43c001)
# Photo of the Day
**President Donald J. Trump** | July 20, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)
# POTUS and VP TODAY
Today, President Trump and Vice President Pence will welcome the survivors of the USS Arizona to the White House. In the afternoon, the Vice President will host a healthcare listening session.

---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Let's build this together, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle, including me. That's nearly half of ALL women in the Senate.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170721-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team,

We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle, including me. That's nearly half of ALL women in the Senate.

Think for a moment what the Senate would look like if we can't help all of our female senators launch strong campaigns.

I sure remember my experience running for the Senate as a first-time candidate. I had to quickly learn everything it took to talk to voters across the state, raise money, sign up hundreds of volunteers, and stand up to a Republican incumbent with $10 million in the bank.

There were many steps embarking on that campaign trail. And I absolutely couldn't have taken each and every one without strong grassroots support.

So when the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee told me they wanted a strong launch of the Women's Senate Network for the 2018 cycle, to help women run and make sure more voices like mine and Kamala's and Maggie's are in the Senate -- I had to tell you what I immediately told them:

**I 'm all in.**

[**Today, I 'm asking you to join me in becoming a 2018 founding donor of the DSCC Women's Senate Network. Because you've been with us in the past, I'm hoping you'll pitch in and help us build a community to support women who run for office.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170721-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Now let me be honest and upfront: 2018 is going to be a challenging year for Democrats. Ahead are a lot of tight races to protect our seats, including 10 women running for reelection to the Senate -- more than ever before.

That's why the DSCC's Women's Senate Network is ramping up its 2018 efforts to elect smart, tough, and experienced candidates to fight for what's right -- who understand that women are not pre-existing conditions, that we deserve equal pay, and we sure as heck need Planned Parenthood and affordable health care for hardworking families.

So if you're proud of the women in the Senate who are fighting those fights, let's continue that momentum to break barriers and grow women's ranks in leadership.

[**I 'm counting on you to keep fighting for what we all started: Become a 2018 founding donor of the DSCC Women's Senate Network today. And with a gift of $7 or more, you'll even get your very own "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet when you become a member!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170721-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Every minute counts to get a campaign off the ground. It mattered the most when the DSCC helped launched my Senate campaign, and when they were there to help Catherine Cortez Masto and Tammy Duckworth launch their successful 2016 campaigns.

And with your help, they'll be there for the next generation of female candidates right at the beginning.

Thank you for owning a piece of this. Women Senate candidates across the country are going to see how excited we are for them to run.

Senator Elizabeth Warren

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbf8/2b07114c/33a51778/73110ffc/1289191155/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbf8/2b07114c/33a51778/73110fff/1289191155/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbf8/2b07114c/33a51778/73110ffe/1289191155/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdeca/2a380d31/193dedab/fe4592/3233000963/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Hello --
Betsy DeVos keeps making headlines -- first for being one of Trump's most unfit cabinet nominees, then for pushing a budget that would cut $9.2 BILLION from vital public education programs, and most recently for taking steps to diminish civil rights enforcement for students across the country.
To top it off, one of DeVos's team members recently claimed that **" 90%" of campus sexual assault claims "fall into the category of 'we were both drunk,' 'we broke up, and six months later I found myself under a Title IX investigation because she just decided that our last sleeping together was not quite right.'"**
Senator Hassan is holding Betsy DeVos accountable every single day, but she can't do it alone. [**Add your name to tell DeVos and her team not to destroy our public schools and not to dismantle the civil rights protections our students need.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdeca/2a380d31/193dedab/fe4593/3233000963/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201707_DeVosCivilRights?source=e20170721_DeVosCR_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
It's downright absurd that someone who won't protect our civil liberties and wants to cut funds for everything from afterschool programs to mental health initiatives is serving as our Secretary of Education, and it's up to us to hold her accountable.
We can push Betsy DeVos to put hard-working families, students, and teachers ahead of corporate special interests and self-interested billionaires - but only if we work together. [**Please, click here to add your voice and stand against Betsy DeVos 's dangerous agenda.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdeca/2a380d31/193dedab/fe4593/3233000963/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201707_DeVosCivilRights?source=e20170721_DeVosCR_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you,
Team Maggie

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Zero.
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are still trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw millions off their insurance. Add your name -- tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170721_ke_nd&source=em_20170721_ke_nd")**

Derek, there are a lot of numbers getting tossed around when we talk about health care:

* 22 million: the number of Americans who'd lose their coverage if Senate Republicans go ahead with their latest repeal bill, according to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office.
* 15 million: how many of those Americans would lose their health care in the first year alone.
* 59: the percentage of Americans who want to keep the Affordable Care Act, not replace it.

But here's one number that matters more than anything else:

**Zero.**

That's how many legitimate plans Republicans have come up with to keep working families out from under the crushing burden of living without access to affordable health care -- even after seven years of clamoring to "repeal and replace" the Affordable Care Act.

And "zero" also seems to be how much Republicans senators care about what their constituents want.

All over the country, in red states and blue states alike, folks have come out in droves to make our voices heard against the GOP's repeal. Because we kept the pressure on, some Senate Republicans have started to fold -- that's good news for working families and something we should all be proud of.

But this fight is far from over, and we have to stay vigilant. We know Trump, Pence, McConnell, and Ryan won't go down without a fight.

**Make sure they know you won't either. Add your name and say you'll keep fighting to stop repeal:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170721_ke_nd&source=em_20170721_ke_nd")**
Thanks, as always, for all that you do.

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523152/4067b0a/30a3c4fce/7e6d4674/2913135531/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170721_ke_nd&source=em_20170721_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523152/4067b0a/30a3c4fce/7e6d4675/2913135531/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170721_ke_nd&source=em_20170721_ke_nd"). clean_body: Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are still trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw millions off their insurance. Add your name -- tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal: "" Derek, there are a lot of numbers getting tossed around when we talk about health care: 22 million: the number of Americans who'd lose their coverage if Senate Republicans go ahead with their latest repeal bill, according to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office. 15 million: how many of those Americans would lose their health care in the first year alone. 59: the percentage of Americans who want to keep the Affordable Care Act, not replace it. But here's one number that matters more than anything else: Zero. That's how many legitimate plans Republicans have come up with to keep working families out from under the crushing burden of living without access to affordable health care -- even after seven years of clamoring to "repeal and replace" the Affordable Care Act. And "zero" also seems to be how much Republicans senators care about what their constituents want. All over the country, in red states and blue states alike, folks have come out in droves to make our voices heard against the GOP's repeal. Because we kept the pressure on, some Senate Republicans have started to fold -- that's good news for working families and something we should all be proud of. But this fight is far from over, and we have to stay vigilant. We know Trump, Pence, McConnell, and Ryan won't go down without a fight. Make sure they know you won't either. Add your name and say you'll keep fighting to stop repeal: ""** Thanks, as always, for all that you do. Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: R. Jai Gillum
subject: Shhh
body:
#
Team --
Andrew celebrated his 37th birthday at the Democratic National Convention a little over a year ago; and as he spoke on the day after his birthday, I remember thinking that I could not ever be more proud of him than I was in that moment.
Well, that changed this March when we launched this campaign for Governor of Florida, and again in May when we welcomed Davis Allen Gillum, our third baby, into the world. And now it seems that every day, he somehow manages to make me more proud of him and more grateful for him.
Andrew leads and lives by example. He has a heart for service and is the hardest working man I know. Even with a busy schedule on the campaign trail, he makes time to be a great husband and a wonderful father to Caroline, Jackson, and Davis.
Next week, we will celebrate Andrew's 38th birthday, and I hope you'll help me [**surprise him with the best birthday (and the best year of his life) yet.**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362de/1351302015/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170721-rjai") Now, it'll be hard to top last year's speech, but I think we can do it if we work together. Let me explain...
Andrew has had to buckle down and focus on fundraising lately and travel around the state to places like Orange County and Palm Beach. But his staff told me that if we can get 500 people to donate online by next week, he can have a whole day off to spend with our family.
[**Will you help us give Andrew his best birthday yet by chipping in $38 or whatever you can afford before our deadline next week?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362de/1351302015/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170721-rjai")
I worked with the campaign team to make [**this special fundraising page**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362de/1351302015/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170721-rjai"), which is hidden from his account -- so Andrew doesn't even know it's coming. If you see him on the campaign trail, please be sure not to mention it. I want it to be a surprise.
Andrew works so hard to make this state better for all of us. He deserves a special day to recharge with Caroline, Jackson, and Davis.
[](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362de/1351302015/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170721-rjai")
Thank you for making this surprise (and this campaign!) possible.
Bring it home,
R. Jai Gillum
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362de/1351302015/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170721-rjai")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362d1/1351302015/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362d0/1351302015/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cd/9e00690/4dc9f14c/240362d3/1351302015/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

body:
Friend,

I want to thank you. Because of your support, House Republicans are keeping the promises we made to the American people. It hasn't been easy, but we've done it because we have you.

**Your Republican Representatives just introduced a conservative budget that will put us on the path to prosperity.**

By balancing the budget, building the economy, and strengthening the military, we are keeping our promise to return America to greatness. This was our pledge, campaign after campaign, and we are delivering.

**That 's why this is such a landmark victory for you, Friend, and for all Americans.** Without your support, we wouldn't be on our way to an era of conservative reforms.

We're finally on the right path. But after eight years of liberal rule, we still have a long way to go.** Can I count on your support to make sure we will be prepared for the battles ahead?**

body:
| | |
---
| |
---

---
**_Another Year of Fiscal Responsibility_**
Auditor **Tera Klutz** got the [headlines this week](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cd7fb9c755&e=1acd9bb3d6) when she announced that Indiana - yet again - ended the fiscal year with a surplus and a strong reserve balance. Other states, namely one to the west, are near bankrupt and in dire need of massive spending cuts or massive income tax increases to make ends meet. But here in the Hoosier State, we continued our decade-long run of fiscal responsibility thanks to responsible Republican leadership.

I've said it before, and I'll say it again, when you elect proven leaders you get proven results. And with the proven leadership of Governor **Eric Holcomb** , Auditor Klutz, Speaker **Brian Bosma** and Senate President Pro Tempore **David Long** , more proven results are on the way.
\- Kyle

(Photo: Chairman Hupfer hits the mark at the Team Holcomb Sporting Clay Shoot on Tuesday, July 19, 2017.)
---
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
Governor Holcomb - and his Indiana boots! - visited the West Wing of The White House this week to chat with a familiar face. But that's not all. The governor also continued his [Next Level Roads](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=67976ebddf&e=1acd9bb3d6) Tour with stops in [Fort Wayne](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=96037ca9cc&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Goshen](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cbe6cac102&e=1acd9bb3d6), as well as making is 3rd annual visit to [Freudenfest in Oldenburg](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2dd2f5795&e=1acd9bb3d6).

To learn more about the positive impacts of this long-term, sustainable, data-driven infrastructure plan that is fully funded AND will maintain Indiana's position as the Crossroads of America for generations to come, check out these two articles:

| _**Two More Hoosiers Headed to D.C. for High-Level Trump Admin Posts**_
Former INDOT Commissioner and current Indiana State Department of Personnel Director **Brandye Hendrickson** was tapped this week to serve as deputy administrator of the Federal Highway Commission. She joins Director of the Indiana Department of Agriculture, **Ted McKinney** , who was named this week as the first under secretary of trade and foreign agricultural affairs at the U.S. Department of Agriculture, as the latest Hoosiers to take on high-level roles in the Trump Administration. Congratulations to both Brandye and Ted on these well deserved appointments.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Of the people, by the people, for the people - Join us Monday and Tuesday.
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters,

A government of the people, by the people, for the people - this is what our country needs and deserves, but instead, we have representatives who serve the interests of greedy corporations and the billionaire class. Before Congress leaves for recess, we're going to make sure they know what we stand for. We'll be at the Capitol Monday and Tuesday fighting for Medicare for All and our recently launched People's Platform.
**Join us for the Summer for Progress Kickoff event in Capitol Hill**
Speakers include Our Revolution President Nina Turner and Congress Members Pramila Jayapal, Raul Grijalva, Keith Ellison and more!
**"The House Triangle" - SE Corner of 1st and Independence
July 25, 2017 at 11 am
[Click here to join us Tuesday, July 25](https://actionnetwork.org/events/summer-for-progress-press-conference?source=or "https://actionnetwork.org/events/summer-for-progress-press-conference?source=or")**
****[Click here to RSVP to Tuesday's event](https://actionnetwork.org/events/summer-for-progress-press-conference?source=or "https://actionnetwork.org/events/summer-for-progress-press-conference?source=or")****
**Attend the Rally: Thousands Marching For Medicare for All**
Speakers include Our Revolution President Nina Turner, Ben Jealous, candidate for Governor of Maryland, and Representatives Ro Khanna and John Conyers
**U.S. Capitol Building West Lawn
July 24, 2017, 3:00 pm
[Click here to join us on Monday, July 24](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg5cx "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg5cx")**
****[Click here to RSVP to Monday's event](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg5cx "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg5cx")****
Members of Congress and the Democratic Party need to know that earning progressive support means putting people over profit. That is why this summer, Our Revolution and more than a dozen other progressive organizations have launched the Summer for Progress. Over this summer's congressional recess, we will build support for the #PeoplesPlatform, a platform that contains eight bills which address some of the issues everyday Americans face. Learn more about our campaign at [SummerforProgress.com](https://summerforprogress.com/ "https://summerforprogress.com/").
We hope to see you on the Capitol next week as we fight for what we all know is true: health care is a human right.
In solidarity,
Our Revolution Organizing
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

| | _**A Note From Jeanie**_ | |
---
| **Dear Derek,**
**Next Tuesday we are in an all out battle to take back the Senate District 16 seat -- putting it back in Republican hands. We need your help, now, more than ever, with the recent shenanigans witnessed at the Concord Ward 9 State Representative race. Some outrageous, egregious and illegal actions took place.**
**Did you know....**
**_That the Democrat candidate, Kris Schultz, sat next to the ballot box on Election Day?_**
**_That a credit card (with no photo) was used as a form of ID for voting purposes?_**
**_That the moderator said that IDs that did not have a photo on them were permitted as a form of photo ID?_**
**Concord's election was eye-opening and certainly gives us insight into what's coming on Tuesday, July 25th with the Boutin/Cavanaugh race in Senate District 16.**
**WE NEED YOUR HELP! Please help us fight for this Senate seat.**
**Join us on Tuesday, even if you only have an hour or two to spare. Stand at the polls, or stand inside as a poll watcher. Help us make calls to get out the vote.**
**Call me at 225-9341 or[fill out this form and be the difference we need to put us over the top and send David Boutin back to Concord to represent Republican values! ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurkd4UzRFDwnUSlfHiLVwfpBRRj4XBr8rQS6IbhP1EDK7sBTZzu5rcYeHqhehxlzElg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MhpPvc4uvzORAN-2FlwFKmG-2F7lKWPGyz7Z-2BUtgEo-2F8FsUvKFe0FUzeWpoSDVt4Z5Mm0FFAxQGd-2BrD-2FGAe7UlvMBjuKfAJ-2Bj-2BUOABD69gzaqNA4iFnjGHQjWsUUUzmAz-2BBlmv5mxkWQzzEVFanQ6o2t90xDC6QWkhKU2nxF3gC7KR7Wv7FNfqdMbYFmzEzlKuima0RLHvkbdbN1CKaW60AvYnr128v-2F6j-2BzeHRdCWRDUw8U546qXccLZdPGADTG6GjPR1r-2Ft5j6Cu7-2FqR7cqSD0PAA-3D-3D)**

We need your help, now, more than ever, with the recent shenanigans witnessed at the Concord Ward 9 State Representative race. Some outrageous, egregious and illegal actions took place. Did you know.... That the Democrat candidate, Kris Schultz, sat next to the ballot box on Election Day? That a credit card (with no photo) was used as a form of ID for voting purposes? That the moderator said that IDs that did not have a photo on them were permitted as a form of photo ID? Concord's election was eye-opening and certainly gives us insight into what's coming on Tuesday, July 25th with the Boutin/Cavanaugh race in Senate District 16. WE NEED YOUR HELP! Please help us fight for this Senate seat. Join us on Tuesday, even if you only have an hour or two to spare. Stand at the polls, or stand inside as a poll watcher. Help us make calls to get out the vote. Call me at 225-9341 or Rest assured that if Kevin Cavanaugh goes to Concord, he will not work with Governor Sununu or with Senate Republicans.
